title: selaginella zechii
intro: Selaginella zechii, also known as the Chinese spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, mat-forming plant native to the subtropical regions of China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as respiratory issues, skin problems, and wounds. The health benefits of Selaginella zechii include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Selaginella zechii is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, or ointments that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
